description_long: This is a modern, single-story house enclosed by a dark perimeter fence and surrounded by landscaped greenery, including several conical trees at the corners. The house features a prominent central hip roof flanked by two flat-roofed wings, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light. The backyard includes a play area with a swing set, sandbox, and a small patio, while the front showcases a covered porch with outdoor seating. The exterior is finished in light gray siding, complemented by white trim and a dark roof. The property is well-organized, with clear zones for recreation, relaxation, and entry. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a central hip roof, flat-roofed wings, large windows, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a dark fence. Features include a covered porch, play area, and multiple outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, covered porch with seating, large windows, and the symmetrical layout of the house within a fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard play area with a swing set, sandbox, and patio, as well as the flat-roofed wing and landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with multiple windows, the central hip roof, and the fenced boundary with corner trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the flat-roofed section, additional yard space, and the arrangement of trees and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with outdoor seating, wide steps, and large glass doors under an overhanging roof.
